About Personaliteeess

Nigerian roots.
Winnipeg soul.

Born from a deep love of beauty, detail, and celebration — Personaliteeess brings the warmth of Nigerian hospitality to the heart of Winnipeg. Every setup we create is a labour of love, styled to leave a lasting impression.

Clients Served

How It Works

Simple steps to your perfect setup

01
DM on Instagram

Find us on Instagram and send a direct message with your vision, preferred date, and event details.

02
Book 5 Days Prior

All bookings must be confirmed at least 5 days before your event to ensure flawless preparation.

03
We Create the Magic

Our team sources and sets up every element to deliver an experience that exceeds your expectations.

04
You Celebrate

Arrive to a space crafted just for you. All that's left is to enjoy every beautiful moment.
